# zstack_baremetal_pxe_server (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage baremetal PXE servers in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dhcp_interface` (String) The DHCP interface.
- `hostname` (String) The PXE server hostname.
- `name` (String) The name of the PXE server.
- `ssh_password` (String, Sensitive) The SSH password.
- `ssh_username` (String) The SSH username.
- `storage_path` (String) The storage path.
- `zone_uuid` (String) The zone UUID.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the PXE server.
- `dhcp_range_begin` (String) DHCP range begin.
- `dhcp_range_end` (String) DHCP range end.
- `dhcp_range_netmask` (String) DHCP range netmask.
- `ssh_port` (Number) The SSH port.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state.
- `status` (String) The status.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the PXE server.
